zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel ferch Gruffud於1421年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas28歲，母親Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn22歲。她於1439年與William Clement I在威爾士卡迪甘史爾卡洛-可-可拉德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年在威爾士卡迪甘史爾特雷加隆享年64歲，埋葬在威爾士卡迪甘史爾特雷加隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel ferch Gruffud于1421年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾时，她的父亲Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas28岁，母亲Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn22岁。她于1439年与William Clement I在威尔士卡迪甘史爾卡洛-可-可拉德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年在威尔士卡迪甘史爾特雷加隆享年64岁，埋葬在威尔士卡迪甘史爾特雷加隆。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel ferch Gruffud was born in 1421, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, was 28 and her mother, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, was 22. She married William Clement I in 1439, in Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1485, in Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Wales, at the age of 64, and was buried in Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel ferch Gruffud est née en 1421, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Clement I en 1439, à Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1485, à Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Galles, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel ferch Gruffud 1421 in Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas 28 und ihre Mutter Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn 22. Sie hat 1439 in Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Wales William Clement I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1485 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Wales und wurde in Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel ferch Gruffud è nata il nel 1421 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Clement I nel 1439, nel Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1485, nel Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Galles, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel ferch Gruffudが1421年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolasは28歳，母Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnnは22歳であった。1439年にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアカーオン-ウウチ-クラウッドでWilliam Clement Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアトレガーオンで64歳で死去し，ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアトレガーオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel ferch Gruffud(이)가 1421년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1439년 웨일스 카디건실르 캐론-wch-클로드에서 William Clement I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 웨일스 카디건실르 트레가에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카디건실르 트레가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel ferch Gruffud nasceu em 1421, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Clement I em 1439, em Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1485, em Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Gales, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Gales.

ru.See, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germany: си, сулзбач-росенбирг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel ferch Gruffud родилась в 1421 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Clement I в 1439 г. в местности карон-увч-клавдд, кардиганьшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1485 г. в местности трегарон, кардиганьшир, Уэльс в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности трегарон, кардиганьшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel ferch Gruffud nació en 1421, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William Clement I en 1439, en Caron-uwch-clawdd, Cardiganshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1485, en Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Gales, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Gales.
